brands.name: Bajaj
brands.logo: <svg viewBox='0 0 100 100' fill='none' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='9' stroke-linecap='round'><path d='M75 30 C65 20 50 18 38 25 C25 32 18 48 22 62 C26 77 42 85 55 80 C68 75 75 62 75 50' /></svg>

products.name: 3-Piece Cable Combo (Front/Rear Brake + Acc.)
products.description: Front & Rear Brake + Accelerator Throttle Cable Set
products.longDescription: High-demand replacement cable combo for OLA S1 Electric scooters. Resolves the common 15-20 day waiting period at official OLA service centers. Built with premium stainless steel wire core and anti-corrosion outer sleeves for smooth control.

products.name: Tempered Screen Guard (Touchscreen)
products.description: 9H Hardness Ultra Clear Touchscreen Tempered Glass
products.longDescription: Premium 9H tempered glass screen guard custom cut for the OLA S1 dashboard. Prevents screen degradation and water damage from direct sunlight and heavy rain. Highly recommended day-one purchase for new owners.

products.name: Full Body Metal Crash Guard
products.description: Heavy-Duty Powder Coated Metal Crash Guard kit
products.longDescription: Robust full-body wrap-around metal protection guard frame. OLA's stock fibre/plastic body panel breaks easily on minor falls; this steel guard absorbs all impacts to save you thousands in panel replacement costs.

products.name: Heavy Duty Ladies Footrest
products.description: Ergonomic Folding Side Footrest for Family Comfort
products.longDescription: Premium side step footrest designed for the TVS iQube family scooter. Crucial safety accessory for pillion riders who sit sideways. Built from heavy-duty cast aluminium with anti-skid rubber padding.

products.name: 7D Floor Mat + Charging Cap Cover
products.description: Custom Fit 7D Anti-Skid Floor Mat with Protective Charging Cap
products.longDescription: Best-seller combination for TVS iQube owners. Water-resistant 7D floor deck mat shields your deck from dirt accumulation, and the waterproof silicone cap keeps your charger socket dry during rainy monsoon rides.

products.name: Premium Seat Cover + Boot Mat
products.description: Ergonomic Sporty Stitched Seat Cover and Matching Rubber Boot Mat
products.longDescription: Add premium comfort styling to your Ather. Features a customized high-density double-stitched leatherette seat cover paired with a custom-fit rubber boot mat to protect the underseat storage space.

products.name: Ather Display Protector (9H Nano)
products.description: 9H Flexible Nano-Glass Shield for Ather Console
products.longDescription: Avoid the heavy ₹15,000+ replacement cost of a cracked Ather smart console. 9H flexible nano-glass protection is shatter-proof, scratch-resistant, and maintains original touch response.

products.name: Full-Body Stainless Steel Guard
products.description: Rust-Free Full Wrap Stainless Steel Protection Bumper Set
products.longDescription: Since the Bajaj Chetak is made of premium metal/iron sheet body panels, getting scratches leads to high denting and painting costs. Protect your scooter from dents with this stylish stainless steel guard kit.

products.name: Chetak Integrated Ladies Step
products.description: Custom Fit Heavy Duty Folding Step Footrest
products.longDescription: The Bajaj Chetak does not come with a side pillion step-assist footrest in-built from the factory. This hot-selling aftermarket component solves that, folding out smoothly and locking for family passenger safety.
